## Constants

<a name="UNIT_TYPE_HOST_MGR"></a>UNIT\_TYPE\_\* constants represent types of systemd units to indicate their function in the system.

```go
const (
    UNIT_TYPE_HOST_MGR = iota
    UNIT_TYPE_HOST_SVC
    UNIT_TYPE_HOST_APP
    UNIT_TYPE_ADMVM
    UNIT_TYPE_ADMVM_MGR
    UNIT_TYPE_ADMVM_SVC
    UNIT_TYPE_ADMVM_APP
    UNIT_TYPE_SYSVM
    UNIT_TYPE_SYSVM_MGR
    UNIT_TYPE_SYSVM_SVC
    UNIT_TYPE_SYSVM_APP
    UNIT_TYPE_APPVM
    UNIT_TYPE_APPVM_MGR
    UNIT_TYPE_APPVM_SVC
    UNIT_TYPE_APPVM_APP
)
```

<a name="APP_ARG_FLAG"></a>APP\_ARG\_\* constants represent types of application arguments.

```go
const (
    APP_ARG_FLAG = "flag"
    APP_ARG_URL  = "url"
    APP_ARG_FILE = "file"
)
```

<a name="ApplicationManifest"></a>
## type ApplicationManifest

ApplicationManifest represents the manifest for an application, including its name, command, arguments, and directories.

```go
type ApplicationManifest struct {
    Name        string   `json:"name"`
    Command     string   `json:"command"`
    Args        []string `json:"args,omitempty"`
    Directories []string `json:"directories,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="EndpointConfig"></a>
## type EndpointConfig

EndpointConfig represents the configuration for an endpoint, including transport settings, services, and TLS configuration.

```go
type EndpointConfig struct {
    Transport TransportConfig
    Services  []string
    TlsConfig *tls.Config
}
```

<a name="GrpcServiceRegistration"></a>
## type GrpcServiceRegistration

GrpcServiceRegistration represents a gRPC service registration, including its name and the method to register the service with a gRPC server.

```go
type GrpcServiceRegistration interface {
    Name() string
    RegisterGrpcService(*grpc.Server)
}
```

<a name="ProxyConfig"></a>
## type ProxyConfig

ProxyConfig represents the configuration for a proxy, including transport settings, whether it is a server, the socket path, and TLS configuration.

```go
type ProxyConfig struct {
    Transport TransportConfig
    Server    bool   `json:"server"`
    Socket    string `json:"socket"`
    TlsConfig *tls.Config
}
```

<a name="RegistryEntry"></a>
## type RegistryEntry

RegistryEntry represents an entry in the registry, including its name, parent, type, transport configuration, state, and whether it should be watched.

```go
type RegistryEntry struct {
    Name      string
    Parent    string
    Type      UnitType
    Transport TransportConfig
    State     UnitStatus
    Watch     bool
}
```

<a name="TlsConfigJson"></a>
## type TlsConfigJson

TlsConfigJson represents the JSON configuration for TLS, including whether it is enabled, the CA certificate path, the certificate path, and the key path.

```go
type TlsConfigJson struct {
    Enable     bool   `json:"enable"`
    CaCertPath string `json:"caCertPath"`
    CertPath   string `json:"certPath"`
    KeyPath    string `json:"keyPath"`
}
```

<a name="TransportConfig"></a>
## type TransportConfig

TransportConfig represents the configuration for a transport layer.

```go
type TransportConfig struct {
    Name     string `json:"name"`
    Address  string `json:"addr"`
    Port     string `json:"port"`
    Protocol string `json:"protocol"`
}
```

<a name="UnitStatus"></a>
## type UnitStatus

UnitStatus represents the status of a systemd unit.

```go
type UnitStatus struct {
    Name         string
    Description  string
    LoadState    string
    ActiveState  string
    SubState     string
    Path         string
    FreezerState string
}
```

<a name="UnitType"></a>
## type UnitType



```go
type UnitType uint32
```
